---
title: "embed_analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(rmarkdown)
library(knitr)
library(psych)
#BiocManager::install("waldronlab/imageFeatureTCGA")
#packageVersion("imageFeatureTCGA")
library(imageFeatureTCGA)
library(curatedTCGAData)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(dplyr)
library(TCGAutils)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(GSVA)
library(msigdbr)

```





# Load slide data catalog (Kidney Renal Cancer)

```{r load embeddings}
catalog_kidney <- getCatalog("provgigapath") |> 
    dplyr::filter(level == "slide_level", Project.ID == "TCGA-KIRC") |>
     dplyr::slice(1:100)

# issue with 
```


# Read Kidney Renal Cancer assay with curatedTCGA

```{r load_rnaseq, message=FALSE}
#------------------------------------------
# Load Kidney assays
#------------------------------------------

kidney_mae_all <- curatedTCGAData(
  diseaseCode = "KIRC",
  assays = "*",
  version = "2.1.1",
  dry.run = FALSE
)

kidney_assays_subset <- c(
    "KIRC_RNASeq2GeneNorm-20160128", # Gene expression (mRNA abundance).
    "KIRC_RPPAArray-20160128", 
    "KIRC_mRNAArray-20160128") # Discrete copy number changes per gene (−2 deletion → +2 amplification).
kidney_mae <- kidney_mae_all[,,which(names(kidney_mae_all) %in% kidney_assays_subset)]


```

```{r}
# linkTCGA will match patients based on TCGA barcodes and keep only those
# with both molecular and slide data.
kidney_mae_emb <- linkTCGA(kidney_mae, catalog_kidney, redownload = FALSE, parallel = FALSE)

# Add row names to the slide_assay (needed for downstream)
rownames(kidney_mae_emb[["slide_assay"]]) <- paste0("slide_feat_", seq_len(nrow(kidney_mae_emb[["slide_assay"]])))
```



# Align embeddings

```{r}
slide_sm <- sampleMap(kidney_mae_emb)[sampleMap(kidney_mae_emb)$assay == "slide_assay", ]
patients <- unique(slide_sm$primary)

kidney_aligned <- list()
for (nm in names(experiments(kidney_mae_emb))) {
  se <- experiments(kidney_mae_emb)[[nm]]
  mat <- assay(se)                       # features x samples
  sm <- sampleMap(kidney_mae_emb)[sampleMap(kidney_mae_emb)$assay == nm, ]
  col_patients <- sm$primary[match(colnames(mat), sm$colname)]
  
  patient_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(mat), ncol = length(patients),
                        dimnames = list(rownames(mat), patients))
  for (pat in patients) {
    cols <- which(col_patients == pat)
    if (length(cols) == 1) {
      patient_mat[, pat] <- mat[, cols]
    } else if (length(cols) > 1) {
      patient_mat[, pat] <- rowMeans(mat[, cols, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  }
  # Convert to numeric if needed
  if (!is.numeric(patient_mat)) {
    patient_mat <- matrix(as.numeric(patient_mat), nrow = nrow(patient_mat),
                          dimnames = dimnames(patient_mat))
  }
  # Remove all‑NA features
  keep <- rowSums(!is.na(patient_mat)) > 0
  kidney_aligned[[nm]] <- patient_mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
}


```

### Check Patients

```{r}
# Number of patients after alignment
n_patients <- ncol(kidney_aligned[["slide_assay"]])
cat("Patients with both embeddings and molecular data:", n_patients, "\n")

# Dimensions of each assay
lapply(kidney_aligned, dim)
```

# Metadata
```{r}
# Extract metadata from the MultiAssayExperiment
coldata <- as.data.frame(colData(kidney_mae_emb))
coldata$patient <- TCGAbarcode(rownames(coldata), participant = TRUE)
# Keep one row per patient
meta <- coldata[!duplicated(coldata$patient), ]
rownames(meta) <- meta$patient

# Embedding matrix
embed_mat <- t(kidney_aligned[["slide_assay"]])
embed_mat <- embed_mat[complete.cases(embed_mat), ]

# Align metadata and embeddings
common <- intersect(rownames(embed_mat), rownames(meta))
embed_meta <- embed_mat[common, ]
meta_sub <- meta[common, ]
```



# Embedding structure

```{r}
# Compute PCA on aligned embeddings
pca_res <- prcomp(embed_meta, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

# Build data frame for plotting
pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:2])
colnames(pca_df) <- c("PC1", "PC2")
pca_df$Patient <- rownames(pca_df)
pca_df$Stage <- meta_sub[rownames(pca_df), "pathologic_stage"]

# Remove missing stage
pca_df <- pca_df[!is.na(pca_df$Stage), ]

# Keep stages with at least 3 patients (ellipse needs n>2)
stage_counts <- table(pca_df$Stage)
keep_stages <- names(stage_counts[stage_counts >= 3])
pca_df <- pca_df[pca_df$Stage %in% keep_stages, ]

# Variance explained
var_exp <- round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:2] * 100, 1)

# Plot with ellipses
ggplot(pca_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = Stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, linetype = 2, size = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", var_exp[1], "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", var_exp[2], "%)"),
       title = "PCA of KIRC embeddings – coloured by pathologic stage",
       colour = "Stage") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))


```




```{r}


# Select the 20 most consistent features (lowest variance)
# Already have top_consistent from your code
consistent_mat <- embed_mat[, top_consistent]   # patients x 20

# For clarity, transpose so rows = features, columns = patients
consistent_mat <- t(consistent_mat)            # 20 features x patients

# Scale each feature (row) to mean 0 and sd 1 (equivalent to scale = "row" in heatmap)
scaled_mat <- t(scale(t(consistent_mat)))      # rows scaled

# Set patient labels: if many patients (>50), show index or hide
if (ncol(scaled_mat) > 50) {
  patient_labels <- rep("", ncol(scaled_mat))   # blank labels to avoid clutter
} else {
  patient_labels <- colnames(scaled_mat)
}

# Create heatmap
pheatmap(scaled_mat,
         scale = "none",                     # already scaled
         cluster_rows = TRUE,                # cluster similar features
         cluster_cols = TRUE,                # cluster similar patients
         show_rownames = TRUE,               # show feature names (slide_feat_xxx)
         show_colnames = (ncol(scaled_mat) <= 50), # show patient IDs only if ≤50
         labels_col = patient_labels,
         fontsize_row = 8,
         fontsize_col = 6,
         main = "20 most consistent embedding features (lowest variance across patients)\nZ-score scaled by row",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(50),
         legend = TRUE,
         legend_title = "Row Z‑score")
```


# Correlate embedding features and clinical variables

```{r}
clinical_vars <- data.frame(
  age = as.numeric(meta_sub$patient.age_at_initial_pathologic_diagnosis),
  sex = ifelse(meta_sub$gender == "MALE", 1, 0),
  pathologic_stage = as.numeric(as.factor(meta_sub$pathologic_stage)),
  T_stage = as.numeric(as.factor(meta_sub$pathology_T_stage)),
  N_stage = as.numeric(as.factor(meta_sub$pathology_N_stage)),
  M_stage = as.numeric(as.factor(meta_sub$pathology_M_stage)),
  row.names = rownames(meta_sub)
)
# Drop all-NA columns
clinical_vars <- clinical_vars[, colSums(!is.na(clinical_vars)) > 0, drop = FALSE]

# ----- 2. Embedding features (top 50 variable) -----
embed_mat <- t(kidney_aligned[["slide_assay"]])
feature_vars <- apply(embed_mat, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top50 <- order(feature_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(50, ncol(embed_mat))]
embed_top <- embed_mat[, top50]

# Remove zero‑variance embedding features
sd_feat <- apply(embed_top, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
keep_feat <- which(!is.na(sd_feat) & sd_feat > 0)
embed_top <- embed_top[, keep_feat, drop = FALSE]

# ----- 3. Align patients -----
common <- intersect(rownames(embed_top), rownames(clinical_vars))
embed_aligned <- embed_top[common, , drop = FALSE]
clin_aligned <- clinical_vars[common, , drop = FALSE]

# Remove zero‑variance clinical variables
sd_clin <- apply(clin_aligned, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
keep_clin <- which(!is.na(sd_clin) & sd_clin > 0)
clin_aligned <- clin_aligned[, keep_clin, drop = FALSE]

# If there are no variable features or no variable clinical variables, stop
if (ncol(embed_aligned) == 0) stop("No variable embedding features left.")
if (ncol(clin_aligned) == 0) stop("No variable clinical variables left.")

# ----- 4. Correlation matrix (features x clinical) -----
cor_mat <- cor(embed_aligned, clin_aligned, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
# Remove any columns/rows that are all NA (should not happen after filtering)
cor_mat <- cor_mat[!apply(is.na(cor_mat), 1, all), , drop = FALSE]
cor_mat <- cor_mat[, !apply(is.na(cor_mat), 2, all), drop = FALSE]

# If matrix is empty, stop
if (nrow(cor_mat) == 0 || ncol(cor_mat) == 0) stop("Correlation matrix empty after cleaning.")


cluster_rows <- nrow(cor_mat) > 1
cluster_cols <- ncol(cor_mat) > 1

pheatmap(cor_mat,
         cluster_rows = cluster_rows,
         cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
         main = "Correlation: embedding features vs clinical variables",
         color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(50),
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 8,
         fontsize_col = 10)
```


# Identify embedding features most correlated with clinical variables

```{r}

# 'cor_mat' is pre‑computed: rows = embedding features, columns = clinical variables

feature_ranking <- list()

for (var in colnames(cor_mat)) {
  cors <- cor_mat[, var]
  
  # Top 10 positive correlations
  pos_idx <- order(cors, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10]
  pos_feat <- names(cors)[pos_idx]
  pos_cor <- cors[pos_idx]
  
  # Top 10 negative correlations (most negative first)
  neg_idx <- order(cors, decreasing = FALSE)[1:10]
  neg_feat <- names(cors)[neg_idx]
  neg_cor <- cors[neg_idx]
  
  feature_ranking[[var]] <- data.frame(
    Clinical_Variable = var,
    Direction = rep(c("Positive", "Negative"), each = 10),
    Embedding_Feature = c(pos_feat, neg_feat),
    Correlation = c(pos_cor, neg_cor)
  )
}

# Combine all variables into one table and clean row names
top_features_table <- do.call(rbind, feature_ranking)
rownames(top_features_table) <- NULL
```

# Compute pathway scores (GSVA) and correlate with embeddings

```{r}
# Get Hallmark gene sets
hallmark <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H") %>%
  split(x = .$gene_symbol, f = .$gs_name)

# RNA‑seq matrix (genes x patients)
rna_mat <- as.matrix(kidney_aligned[["KIRC_RNASeq2GeneNorm-20160128"]])

# Run ssGSEA to get per‑patient pathway activity scores
ssgsea_param <- ssgseaParam(exprData = rna_mat, geneSets = hallmark,
                            alpha = 0.25, normalize = TRUE)
gsva_scores <- gsva(ssgsea_param, verbose = FALSE)   # pathways x patients
pathway_scores <- t(gsva_scores)                     # patients x pathways

# Prepare embedding matrix (patients x features)
embed_mat <- t(kidney_aligned[["slide_assay"]])
embed_mat <- embed_mat[complete.cases(embed_mat), ]

# Align patients (make sure rows match)
common <- intersect(rownames(embed_mat), rownames(pathway_scores))
embed_aligned <- embed_mat[common, ]
pathway_aligned <- pathway_scores[common, ]

# Correlate each embedding feature with each pathway
cor_embed_pathway <- cor(embed_aligned, pathway_aligned, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
# Result: 768 features (rows) × 50 pathways (columns)

# Identify which embedding features were strongly associated with stage/T_stage (from previous table)
stage_features <- unique(
  top_features_table[top_features_table$Clinical_Variable %in% c("pathologic_stage", "T_stage"),
                     "Embedding_Feature"]
)

# Subset correlation matrix to only those features
pathway_cor_subset <- cor_embed_pathway[stage_features, , drop = FALSE]

# For each such feature, get the top 3 positively and negatively correlated pathways
pathway_summary <- list()
for (feat in stage_features) {
  cors <- pathway_cor_subset[feat, ]
  pos <- sort(cors, decreasing = TRUE)[1:3]
  neg <- sort(cors, decreasing = FALSE)[1:3]
  pathway_summary[[feat]] <- data.frame(
    Embedding_Feature = feat,
    Direction = rep(c("Positive", "Negative"), each = 3),
    Pathway = c(names(pos), names(neg)),
    Correlation = c(pos, neg)
  )
}
pathway_df <- do.call(rbind, pathway_summary)
rownames(pathway_df) <- NULL

```
